name: Google Vids
tagline: AI video creation built into Google Workspace
description:
Google Vids is Google's AI-powered video creation tool, built directly into Google Workspace. It lets you create presentation-style videos from text prompts, Google Slides, or Docs  - without any video editing experience required.

Describe what you want, and Google Vids generates a script, finds relevant stock footage from Google's library, suggests background music, and assembles a polished video. You can record yourself presenting over the AI-generated scenes, add narration, or use AI-generated voiceover. The finished video lives in Google Drive like any other Workspace file, shareable with the usual Google controls.

Google Vids 2.0 (launched April 2026) added a significantly improved AI scene generation engine, better lip-sync for recorded narration, and the ability to incorporate footage from Google Meet recordings directly into new videos. It's best suited for business communication, training content, and internal presentations where production polish is useful but a Hollywood production budget isn't available.
features: AI script generation from text prompts
Built-in stock footage and music library
Collaboration via standard Google Workspace sharing
pros: No extra subscription if you already pay for Workspace
Easy collaboration with existing Google tools
Good for business and training video content
No learning curve for Google Workspace users
cons: Limited creative control vs dedicated tools like Runway
Best for presentation-style videos, not cinematic content
Less powerful AI avatars than Synthesia or HeyGen
bestFor: Google Workspace teams making quick business videos
keyStrength: Native integration with Google Docs and Slides
